abstract: Adversarial, architecture-level review and refactoring of Elixir on the BEAM: names the alien mental model existing code betrays (OO/enterprise layering, processes-as-objects, anemic data, defensive control flow, imperative iteration, needless metaprogramming) and prescribes the deep, layer-flattening refactor back to idiomatic Elixir. The diagnostic counterpart to greenfield idiom advice.
